zh.lifeSummary: 當John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer於1450年出生在英國爾塔頓哈爾時，他的父親Sir Nicholas Griffin24歲，母親Lady Catherine Curzon20歲。他和Lady Emmote Whetehill至少有6個兒子和3個女兒。他於1727年住在英國英格蘭諾福爾可布拉德維爾。他去世於1485年9月26日在英國爾塔頓哈爾享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer于1450年出生在英国爾塔頓哈爾时，他的父亲Sir Nicholas Griffin24岁，母亲Lady Catherine Curzon20岁。他和Lady Emmote Whetehill至少有6个儿子和3个女儿。他于1727年住在英国英格兰諾福爾可布拉德維爾。他去世于1485年9月26日在英国爾塔頓哈爾享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Griffin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Gruffin, Griffin, a pet form of Middle Welsh Gruffudd. In the Welsh border counties this name was introduced directly from Welsh, and in the eastern counties of England by Bretons from France who came over with the Norman conquest.
Irish: Anglicized (part translated) form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha ‘descendant of Gríobhtha’, a personal name from gríobh ‘gryphon’.

variants.name: Griffee
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

variants.name: Griffy
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

variants.name: Griffey
meanings: Irish (Clare): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer was born in 1450, in Tattenhall, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Nicholas Griffin, was 24 and his mother, Lady Catherine Curzon, was 20. He had at least 6 sons and 3 daughters with Lady Emmote Whetehill. He lived in Bradwell, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom in 1727. He died on 26 September 1485, in Tattenhall, Cheshire, England, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer est né en 1450, à Tattenhall, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas Griffin, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Catherine Curzon, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles avec Lady Emmote Whetehill. Il a vécu à Bradwell, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1727. Il est décédé le 26 septembre 1485, à Tattenhall, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer 1450 in Tattenhall, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nicholas Griffin 24 und seine Mutter Lady Catherine Curzon 20. Er hatte mit Lady Emmote Whetehill mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1727 hat er in Bradwell, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb am 26. September 1485 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Tattenhall, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer è nato il nel 1450 nel Tattenhall, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Nicholas Griffin, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Lady Catherine Curzon, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie con Lady Emmote Whetehill. Vissuto a Bradwell, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1727. Morì il 26 settembre 1485, nel Tattenhall, Cheshire, England, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimerが1450年にイギリスチェシュアイアタッテンハルで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Griffinは24歳，母Lady Catherine Curzonは20歳であった。彼はLady Emmote Whetehillとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1727年にはイギリスイギリスノーフォルクブラドウエルに住んでいた。彼は1485年9月26日にイギリスチェシュアイアタッテンハルで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer(이)가 1450년 영국 체실르 타텐홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Griffin(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Catherine Curzon(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Lady Emmote Whetehill(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1727년도에 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 브라드웰에서 살았다. 그는 1485년 9월 26일 영국 체실르 타텐홀에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer nasceu em 1450, em Tattenhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Griffin, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Catherine Curzon, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas com Lady Emmote Whetehill. Ele viveu em Bradwell, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1727. Ele faleceu em 26 de setembro de 1485, em Tattenhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer родился в 1450 г. в местности таттенолл, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Griffin было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine Curzon, 20. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери от Lady Emmote Whetehill. Он жил в местности брадвелл, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в 1727 году. Он умер 26 сентября 1485 г. в местности таттенолл, чешир, Англия в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer nació en 1450, en Tattenhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Nicholas Griffin, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Catherine Curzon, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas con Lady Emmote Whetehill. Vivió en Bradwell, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1727. Murió el 26 de septiembre de 1485, en Tattenhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años.
